issues.title: Enemy dealt 14 dmg (82% of 17 HP) on floor 3
issues.description: On floor 3, encounter 2, turn 1, the enemy dealt 14 damage against player with 17 HP (82% of current HP). This exceeds the 50% threshold.

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 3 (early game)
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 3 out of the early floors (1-3). This may indicate the early game is too punishing for average profile players. Overall accuracy was 80%.

issues.title: Floor 2 enc 2: 10 turns vs prev floor avg 4.3
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 2 took 10 turns to resolve, which is more than 2x the previous floor's average of 4.3 turns. This indicates a difficulty spike.

issues.title: Card type "wild" was never played during the entire run
issues.description: The card type "wild" had 0 plays across the entire run (104 total cards played). This suggests either the card type was not available in the deck or was not worth playing.
